project_summary: CHAI - AI 小说自动化写作系统

features.description: 拆书功能：根据番茄热词榜选词条，拆解热门书籍并融入大纲
steps: 实现番茄小说热词榜爬虫（fanqienovel.com）
抓取指定词条下的热门书籍列表
设计书籍拆解 Prompt 模板
实现批量拆解热门书籍的逻辑
将拆解结果（人物模板、情节模式、世界观设定）存入数据库
实现将拆解结果自动融入小说大纲的功能
添加单元测试验证
features.notes: FanqieCrawler with API+web fallback. CharacterTemplate/PlotPattern/WorldTemplate models. DeconstructDB (JSON). BookDeconstructor engine. AIService deconstruction prompts. CLI commands. 38 tests passing.

features.notes: NovelEngine orchestration class added. Full autonomous workflow (plan→write→proofread) implemented. CLI run command added. 22 tests passing.

features.notes: Enhanced core engines: StoryPlanner (multiple plot structures: Three-Act, Hero's Journey, Seven-Point, Save-the-Cat), Editor (dialogue tags, punctuation, pacing analysis, foreshadowing checks), ChapterWriter (scene-level generation with SceneType), StyleEngine (tone/style consistency, character voice, descriptive density). 50 tests passing.

features.notes: WorldBuilder engine added. 7 AI service methods for world component generation (geography, politics, culture, history, magic system, social structure). CLI 'build-world' command added. 52 tests passing.

features.description: 创建完整的世界观体系（地理、政治、文化、历史）

features.notes: WorldSystem class added with relationship analysis (geography-politics, politics-culture, culture-history, history-geography). build_core_world() for 4 core elements without magic/social. build_world_system() creates integrated world with tracked relationships. validate_world_consistency() checks for logical issues. get_world_summary() provides human-readable overview. export_world_system() exports complete system. 67 tests passing.

features.notes: Created ChapterWordCountEngine with 7 models for validating 2000-4000 word count target. Added analyze_chapter(), analyze_novel(), create_revision_plan(), generate_report() methods. Supports Chinese word counting, issue identification, severity calculation, revision planning. 25 new tests pass. Total 840 tests pass.

features.description: 全书结构：章节目录完整，有序章与尾声
steps: Inspect the current code paths related to '全书结构：章节目录完整，有序章与尾声'.

Verify '全书结构：章节目录完整，有序章与尾声' through repository smoke tests or targeted checks.
features.notes: Added is_prologue/is_epilogue fields to TableOfContentsEntry and PDFTableOfContentsEntry models. Updated MarkdownManuscriptEngine._create_toc() and _render_toc() to properly track and display prologue/epilogue in TOC. Updated PDFManuscriptEngine._create_toc() and _build_toc() similarly. TOC now correctly shows '序章：' and '尾声：' prefixes for prologue/epilogue chapters instead of chapter numbers. Added 2 new unit tests for TOC prologue/epilogue flags and rendering.
